name: Princess Cinderella Sidekick GusGus Kids' Pillow Buddy - The Disney Collection by Pillowfort™
description: Give your child the gift of cuddly Disney magic with this Princess Cinderella Sidekick GusGus Kids' Pillow Buddy from The Disney Collection by Pillowfort™. Featuring Cinderella's cutest mouse sidekick GusGus, this pillow buddy is the best, softest companion for naptime, playtime fun or a adding a new twist to your young Disney fan's bedroom decor.
